expected_keyboard.Tab: Moves focus between focusable elements inside the dialog
expected_keyboard.Shift+Tab: Moves focus backwards inside the dialog
expected_keyboard.Escape: Closes the dialog, returns focus to the trigger element

focus_rules: On open: focus moves to the first focusable element inside the dialog
Focus must be trapped inside the dialog while open
On close: focus returns to the element that triggered the dialog

expected_keyboard.Tab: Moves focus between focusable elements inside the dialog
expected_keyboard.Shift+Tab: Moves focus backwards inside the dialog
expected_keyboard.Escape: Closes the dialog if cancellation is allowed

focus_rules: On open: focus moves to the first focusable element (often a confirm button)
Focus must be trapped inside the dialog while open
On close: focus returns to the element that triggered the dialog

expected_keyboard.Escape: Close the menu, return focus to trigger

focus_rules: On open: focus moves to the first menu item
Arrow keys cycle through items without wrapping by default
Type-ahead: typing a letter moves focus to the next item starting with that letter

expected_keyboard.ArrowRight: Move to next top-level menu item
expected_keyboard.ArrowLeft: Move to previous top-level menu item
expected_keyboard.ArrowDown: Open submenu and move to first item
expected_keyboard.ArrowUp: Open submenu and move to last item
expected_keyboard.Escape: Close submenu, return focus to parent menubar item
expected_keyboard.Home: Move to first item in menubar
expected_keyboard.End: Move to last item in menubar

focus_rules: Only one item in the menubar is in the tab order
Arrow keys move between items
Submenus open on Enter or ArrowDown
Only the active tab is in the tab order (tabindex=0)
Inactive tabs have tabindex=-1
Arrow keys move between tabs, Tab moves to the tab panel content

expected_keyboard.ArrowDown: Open the listbox and move to next option
expected_keyboard.Enter: Select the focused option and close
expected_keyboard.Home: Move cursor to start of input (when listbox closed)
expected_keyboard.End: Move cursor to end of input (when listbox closed)

focus_rules: Focus stays on the input element at all times
aria-activedescendant points to the visually focused option
aria-expanded reflects whether the listbox is open
For single-select: selection follows focus
For multi-select: Space toggles selection without moving focus
Type-ahead moves focus to matching option

expected_keyboard.ArrowDown: Move to next visible tree item
expected_keyboard.ArrowUp: Move to previous visible tree item
expected_keyboard.ArrowRight: Expand closed node / move to first child of open node
expected_keyboard.ArrowLeft: Collapse open node / move to parent of closed node
expected_keyboard.End: Move to last visible tree item

focus_rules: aria-expanded on parent nodes reflects open/closed state
Only visible items receive focus

expected_keyboard.ArrowRight: Move to next cell in row
expected_keyboard.ArrowLeft: Move to previous cell in row
expected_keyboard.ArrowDown: Move to same cell in next row
expected_keyboard.ArrowUp: Move to same cell in previous row
expected_keyboard.Home: Move to first cell in row
expected_keyboard.End: Move to last cell in row
expected_keyboard.PageDown: Scroll down one page of rows
expected_keyboard.PageUp: Scroll up one page of rows

focus_rules: Tab moves focus into the grid, then to the next focusable element outside
Arrow keys navigate between cells
If a cell contains a single interactive widget, that widget receives focus
Must have aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax
aria-valuetext provides human-readable value description when needed

expected_keyboard.Enter: Toggle the focused section open or closed
expected_keyboard.Space: Toggle the focused section open or closed

focus_rules: Each accordion header should be focusable
aria-expanded reflects the open/closed state
The panel content is revealed/hidden when toggled

expected_keyboard.Tab: Move focus to controls or content within the current slide

focus_rules: Autoplay must be pausable via keyboard
Current slide indicator should be announced
Rotation stops when any element in the carousel receives focus
Tooltip appears when trigger element receives focus
Tooltip dismisses on Escape without moving focus
Tooltip content is accessible via aria-describedby on the trigger

expected_keyboard.Enter: Toggle the disclosure open or closed
expected_keyboard.Space: Toggle the disclosure open or closed

focus_rules: The trigger button has aria-expanded
The controlled content is shown/hidden
